recommendations.title: Las leyendas: El origen
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Adventure, Family, Horror
recommendations.overview: When a human baby crosses the Eternal Mirror, the portal between the living and the dead opens its path to the beings from the underworld.

recommendations.title: Mad God
recommendations.overview: A figure known as "The Assassin" descends from the heavens into a nightmarish pit full of monsters, titans, and cruelty.

recommendations.title: Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dreaming Girl
recommendations.overview: In Fujisawa, Sakuta Azusagawa is in his second year of high school. Blissful days with his girlfriend and upperclassman, Mai Sakurajima, are interrupted by the appearance of his first crush, Shoko Makinohara.

recommendations.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
recommendations.overview: Struggling to find his place in the world while juggling school and family, Brooklyn teenager Miles Morales is unexpectedly bitten by a radioactive spider and develops unfathomable powers just like the one and only Spider-Man. While wrestling with th
recommendations.director: Rodney Rothman, Peter Ramsey, Bob Persichetti

recommendations.title: Love and Monsters
recommendations.overview: Seven years since the Monsterpocalypse began, Joel Dawson has been living underground in order to survive. But after reconnecting over radio with his high school girlfriend Aimee, Joel decides to venture out to reunite with her, despite all the dange

recommendations.title: Turtles Forever
recommendations.overview: Whoa, dude! Worlds collide when the Turtles from one dimension meet the Turtles from another dimension! What the shell is going on? The two Turtle teams must work together to find the Technodrome and undo this multi-dimensional mess!

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.

recommendations.title: The Magic Flute
recommendations.overview: A seventeen year old travels from London to the Austrian Alps to attend the legendary Mozart boarding school. There, he discovers a centuries-old forgotten passageway into the fantastic world of Mozart's "The Magic Flute".

recommendations.title: Gnome Alone
recommendations.overview: When Chloe discovers that her new home's garden gnomes are not what they seem, she must decide between the pursuit of a desired high school life and taking up the fight against the Troggs.

recommendations.title: Look Away
recommendations.overview: A timid and socially alienated 17-year-old high school student's life is turned upside down when she switches places with her sinister mirror image.
